rationale: Gov't Code §2306.126 concerns TDHCA payments in lieu of ad valorem taxes on foreclosed property. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The department may, under its terms, conditions, and rules, pay public agencies in lieu of ad valorem taxes on property that the department acquires through foreclosure or sale under a deed of trust.
_note: No conflict. The rule governs a separate agency property tax exemption, not the residence homestead exemption.
